title: moraea cistiflora
intro: Moraea cistiflora, also known as the jug flower or basket lily, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Moraea cistiflora include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Moraea cistiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
